proposal: Clerk Zero proposes replacing the postal service with trained pigeons. Forms will still be required.

options.label: Approve pigeon post
options.result_text: Mail arrives faster and in feathers. Several letters are eaten.

options.label: Keep human post
options.result_text: Post workers celebrate. Pigeons remain unemployed.

proposal: The main bridge is held together by optimism and duct tape. Repairs will cost real money.

options.label: Fund repairs
options.result_text: The bridge creaks less. Auntie Olga says it is still suspicious.

options.label: Delay again
options.result_text: Citizens take the long route. Optimism declines.

proposal: Today's cabinet briefing includes nine urgent items and one stapler emergency.

options.label: Attend in person
options.result_text: You learn about problems that already became traditions.

options.label: Send a delegate
options.result_text: The delegate enjoys coffee and blame redistribution.
